comment.body: until you break over those there is no real confirmation of any reason back to the upside, VIX holding over 21 seems to be a sign and anything over 21.50 is a bigger sign perhaps of this being an extended move. The smirk convexity she was speaking to is another piece of the puzzle to be suspicious of any probing lower. The wait and see is the right approach it would seem. Hold hedges if you have them, don't short the hole, dont speculate for longs until things are proven
